releases.notes: Accept Terms & Privacy on sign-up, plus Terms/Privacy links in the app and panel.
Assets: the Import bar now always appears when an asset is selected.
Assets: lazy-loaded thumbnails — no more lag or GPU spikes on large folders.
Graph: easing now matches the curve you draw exactly (fixed handle/influence math).
Cleaner, Flow-style Graph editor with the full easing preset library.
Redesigned thumbnails: film grain, a vignette and a refined title, Kage style.
Custom library covers — a real frame from each anime, with a dedicated design.
New Graph tab (Flow-style easing) and automatic updates.
